titleStmt.title: SII 26.775: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 775. (A.R. No. 724 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same maṇḍapa.

This inscription records an order of the king at the instance of a certain Kāṅgēyarājaṉ executed by a certain native of Ālambākkam in Poygai-nāḍu in Tribuvaṉachchakkaravatti Kōnēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ Ulaguḍai-Mukkōkkiḻāṉaḍi-vaḷanāḍu, according to which he was enjoined to give to the sabhai of Madurāntakach-charuppēdimaṅgalam, specified quantities of paddy and kāśu in respect of the land probably held by him, in the village of the sabhai. It is stated that he should give the paddy from the 8th year in the reign of the king. It also states that in case kamuku (areca) trees were grown in a land, no tax need be paid for five years from the date of planting of the trees, but afterwards, the stipulated levy in the form of paddy should be given.
The signatories were the official, the tirumandira-ōlai Rājēndraśiṅga Mūvēndavēḷāṉ, Kurukularājaṉ, Kāḍuveṭṭi, Viḻiñattarājaṉ and Viśaiyarājaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu
100 3 10 5 ṉāl prasātañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti koner Iṉmai koṇ
ṭāṉ Ulakuṭai mukkokkiḻāṉaṭi vaḷanāṭṭup poykai nāṭṭu Ālampākkiḻāṉ maturāntakaccaruppotimaṅ
kalattu sabhaiyārkkut taṅkaḷūr rājagambhirapperāṟṟukkut teṉkaraippaṭṭa nilat
tukku kār maṟuvukku veli Oṉṟukku nel nūṟṟaṟupatiṉ kalamum Oru pūvukku veli
oṉṟukku nellut toṇṇūṟṟukkalam Ivvāṟṟukku vaṭakaraippaṭṭa nilattukku kār ma
ṟuvukku veli Oṉṟukku nellu nūṟṟunāṟpatiṉ kalamum Oru pūvukku veli Oṉṟukku ne
llu Eṇpatiṉ kalamum pu ku veliyāl kācu Iraṇṭum Āka Eṭṭāvatu mutal Iṟu
kka kaṭavatākavum kamukiṭṭa nilam kamu
ku Iṭṭa Āṇṭu mutal Aiyāṭṭai nā
ḷ Iṟaiyiliyāyp piṉpu niccayitta
paṭi Iṟukka kaṭavatākavum peṟa ve
ṇumeṉṟu kāṅkeyarājaṉ namakkuc
coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭava
tākac colli Ippaṭi kaṇakkilum I
ṭṭuk koḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷāka varikkukūṟu
ceyvārkaḷukkuñ coṉṉom tāṅ
kaḷ Eṭṭāvatu mutal payir ceyta ni
lattukku Ippaṭi kaṭamai Iṟukka Eḻu
tiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai rājendraciṅka
muventaveḷāṉ Ivai kurukularājaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ivai kāṭuveṭṭi Eḻuttu Ivai vi
ḻiñattarājaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vi
caiyarājaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.775 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
